Body.Content:
When creating an event, you can now book a workspace directly from the location field by searching or tapping Browse Workspaces. This feature is only available if you have workspace bookings enabled in settings and by your IT admin.

GA date: January CY2026

message.Title: Outlook: Book a Workspace when Creating an Event
